untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) short-term trend line breakout and pullback within N bars — trend line is not available as an indicator; (2) price closure back 'inside' trend line — requires trend line calculation; (3) no new extreme beyond breakout point — requires multi-bar lookback logic not expressible in 3-field condition format. Volume spike multiple and ATR multipliers are parameterized but thresholds ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED]) were not specified in source material.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using sma_20 as trend line substitute, vol_ratio_20 for volume spike detection, and wick analysis for exhaustion signals. However, the core pattern logic (breakout-and-pullback trap within a specific bar count, confirmed by extremes) cannot be faithfully translated without explicit trend line support. Recommend: (a) implement trend line detection in backtest engine, or (b) use linear regression channel (if available) as trend line proxy, or (c) define threshold parameters before encoding.
